The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] was '''attacked''' by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the first year of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
[[File:FirstBattleSarapin.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A Confederate fleet approaches Sarapin.]]

The [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] general, [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], unleashed the collective [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces she had been hiding on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] and led them in an assault on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] along with the stolen [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] weapon, the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]]. In order to safely land on the planet, Tann destroyed the Republic base in the asteroid field near it.

[[File:Decimator_on_Sarapin.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A captured Decimator attacks the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[energy collector]]s on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]].]]

Once on Sarapin, Tann and her forces used the Decimators to destroy the five key armies of the Republic that were stationed on the planet. She also killed [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jor Drakas]] and captured the Republic's citadel at [[Mount Corvast]].

==Aftermath==
As a result of the battle, much of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] were left powerless, spreading fear of the war to that previously-secure region.

*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
